error_signature: Invalid 'text.format.name': string does not match pattern
title: Invalid text format name in AI-Agent Node
symptom: The AI Agent throws an error indicating that the 'text.format.name' does not match the expected pattern, preventing execution.
not_this_if: Error does not relate to JSON schema validation
root_cause: The error occurs when the JSON schema provided to the AI-Agent Node contains invalid characters or formatting, such as unintended spaces, which violate the expected pattern for the 'text.format.name'.
fix_steps: Check the JSON schema for the AI-Agent Node
Remove any trailing or leading spaces in the schema name
Save the changes and re-run the workflow
agent_instruction: Ensure there are no spaces in the JSON schema name for the AI-Agent Node.
